review_summary.college_name: Thiruvalluvar College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am totally dissatisfied because of the hostel, my course, in my life

content.Placements: I have no idea about placements because many of the students have arrears in the college. No company has decided to recruit in my college yet. Students are still looking for job opportunities in various places. In this college, placements are nothing special for students, simply.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. Classrooms have a very dull atmosphere. Labs are not well-equipped. The library is very old and not comfortable for students. The hostel is very badly maintained, and sometimes monkeys even come into my hostel room. Mess food and canteen food are also of very poor quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Awesome college to learn and enjoy.

content.Placements: I got placed in P3 Group as a technical author in the Aerospace Domain with a good pay grade at Bangalore. Some of my Juniors are also placed in the same company, and the remaining were placed in different domains at different locations. Placement drives were also conducted in my 3rd and 4th years.
content.Infrastructure: There will be all the Aeronautical Labs with separate classes with a good environment. This college is near mountains with a superb natural view. All the facilities are available for an engineering student, and all the kind of sports including the swimming pool is available. There is also a separate hostel available year-wise and gender-wise.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2007

content.Other: Nice staff and good atmosphere. Located near Vandavasi, Thiruvannamalai District. Really a superb college with all facilities, not only in education but also in extracurricular activities like sports, games etc. The best thing is food in the hostel, really it is extraordinary.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2013

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and teachers.

content.Placements: Almost 99% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Mindtree, Wipro, Emphasis, NIIT Technologies, IGATE, Cognizant, Capgemini, and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. The food served in the canteen was average. Library was very good. Medical facilities were provided. Sports were conducted in this college.
content.Faculty: Teachers were very helpful and well-qualified. The pass percentage was 98%. Semester exams were easy. They also provided notes and important questions to students. The teaching quality was very good.
